testcase.name: test_real_usage_callback_expectations[background_jackson_0_distant_speech]

failure.message: AssertionError: Non-command background speech from jackson digit 0 with distant speech. Source=FSDD:0_jackson_0.wav. Distant open-source human speech and media should not start a user turn without intent. assert [array([-0.00...type=float32)] == [] Left contains one more item: array([-0.00444025, -0.00551854, -0.00542578, ..., 0. ,\n 0. , 0. ], dtype=float32) Use -v to get more diff
